title: Somehow a Girl Came Out
overview: In a realm which exists right next to reality but no ordinary people can see, there is the "Magician’s Academy" – the school for today's wizards and witches who live between the realms, hiding their true identities while they are among us. Takuto Hasegawa looks like a high school boy who embodies the word "ordinary" in every sense, but he is actually a wizard in the making who secretly attends the Academy.

title: Somehow, What You're Doing Became a Serious Case.
overview: Despite being a wizard, Takuto still has a lot of things to deal with.

title: We Somehow Even Got a Demon Lord Coming Out
overview: With Takuto injured, it's up to Tanarotte to save the day!

title: This is Somewhat Like a Crime
overview: Tanarotte becomes a transfer student at Takuto's school.

title: The Love Of The Two
overview: In the magic world, Metallis learns about love.

title: It's Somehow A Fashion Show
overview: A mysterious figure, Agarin, suddenly buys an entire manga section

title: It's Somehow a Maid, a Ghost and a Mecha
overview: A ghost suddenly appears and scares Agarin.

title: Somehow, a Sister Came & It's a Date
overview: Snow finally falls and everyone is excited!

title: Somehow, the Vacant, Snowy Peaks Invite Multitudes
overview: Three mysterious magicians appear and cause havok.

title: It's Somehow a Matter of Possibilities
It's Somehow a Rampage on the Holy Night
overview: Things in the real world are starting to change.
